pinpoint.campaign.overridebuttonconfigur: Specifies the configuration of a button with settings that are specific to a certain device type.

pinpoint.campaign.overridebuttonconfigur.Description: The action that occurs when a recipient chooses a button in an in-app message. You can specify one of the following:  +  `LINK` – A link to a web destination.+  `DEEP_LINK` – A link to a specific page in an application.+  `CLOSE` – Dismisses the message.
The destination (such as a URL) for a button.
